quotes: Email body width: **600px** fixed, centered
Mobile breakpoint: **480px**; all multi-column layouts collapse to single column
Email body width: **600px** fixed, centered
Mobile breakpoint: **480px**
practical layouts are 1-col, 2-col (50/50), or image/text split (≈40/60)

rules.intent: Ensure seamless section assembly and responsive collapse.
rules.rule_text: Email body width is fixed at 600px (size.canvas.email_body_width_600), centered; sections must render edge-to-edge at exactly 600px so assembled sections butt cleanly. At the mobile breakpoint (breakpoint.email.mobile_480 = 480px) all multi-column layouts collapse to a single column. Internal grid follows a 12-column mental model; practical layouts are 1-col, 2-col (50/50), or an image/text split (≈40/60, ratio.grid.image_text_40_60).

quotes: **Section side padding: 24px** left/right
**Vertical rhythm: 8px base unit.** All padding/margins are multiples of 8
Section top/bottom internal padding: **32px**
Heading → body gap: 16px. Paragraph → paragraph: 16px. Body → callout/CTA: 24px. Image → caption: 8px.
**Section side padding: 24px** left/right (consistent across ALL sections
**Vertical rhythm: 8px base unit.** All padding/margins are multiples of 8.
Section top/bottom internal padding: **32px**
Heading → body gap: 16px. Paragraph → paragraph: 16px. Body → callout/CTA: 24px. Image → caption: 8px.

rules.intent: Consistent spacing rhythm enabling zero-gap section stacking.
rules.rule_text: Section side padding is 24px left/right (section.padding.sides = 24px), consistent across ALL sections so assembly is seamless; full-bleed imagery/gradient backgrounds may run to 600px but text within them still respects the 24px insets. Vertical rhythm is on an 8px base unit (spacing.base.unit_8) with all padding/margins as multiples of 8. Each section owns its own top AND bottom internal padding of 32px (section.padding.top_bottom_32) with no external margins between sections — assembly is zero-gap stacking. Gaps: heading→body 16px, paragraph→paragraph 16px (spacing.gap.heading_body_16), body→callout/CTA 24px (spacing.gap.body_callout_24), image→caption 8px.

quotes: Brand Blue #00529b background, White #ffffff text, Nunito Sans Bold 16px, padding 14px 32px, **min touch target 48px height**
corner radius 24px (fully rounded pill
Secondary CTA: White background, 2px Brand Blue border, Brand Blue text, same metrics

Brand Blue #00529b background, White #ffffff text, Nunito Sans Bold 16px, padding 14px 32px, **min touch target 48px height** (brand accessibility rule: ≥48px clickable areas), corner radius 24px (fully rounded pill
Secondary CTA: White background, 2px Brand Blue border, Brand Blue text, same metrics. One primary CTA per section maximum.

rules.intent: Maintain approved, accessible CTA button treatment.
rules.rule_text: Primary CTA buttons use a Brand Blue background (color.primary.brand_blue = #00529b) with White text (cta.button.label.color = #ffffff), Nunito Sans Bold 16px, padding 14px 32px (padding.button.general_14_32), a minimum 48px touch-target height (size.touch_target.min_48 — brand accessibility rule requiring ≥48px clickable areas), and a fully rounded 24px pill radius (radius.button.pill_24). Secondary CTA uses a White background with a 2px Brand Blue border (border.cta.secondary_2px_brand_blue) and Brand Blue text at the same metrics. Maximum one primary CTA per section.

quotes: One primary CTA per section maximum.
One primary CTA per section maximum.

rules.intent: Preserve a single clear action per section.
rules.rule_text: At most one primary CTA per section.
